title: Cat Climbing
description:
1,347 players grabbed the pre-release demo. Only one reached the top. Can you?

One click. Climbing is another story.Your cat jumps toward wherever you click. That's the entire control scheme. But a slight difference in angle, distance, or landing spot decides whether you climb higher — or fall a long, long way down.

Read the walls. Cling like a cat.The ground isn't your only foothold. Your cat can cling to walls — but not to overhangs beyond vertical. Judge each wall's angle, plan your next landing, and build your route to the top.

 

Mistakes mean falling. Practice means climbing.Rotating platforms, spikes, narrow ledges. Jump in a panic and you may lose serious altitude. There are checkpoints — but the mountain shows no mercy. Every attempt sharpens your aim and timing, and clearing a wall that beat you yesterday is what keeps you climbing.

Carve your name into the LEGENDSClear an area and your fastest time is recorded in the LEGENDS leaderboard. First, reach the top. Then, race the world. The view from the summit belongs only to those who earn it.

Features• Simple, precise controls: your cat jumps where you click

• Cat-style climbing built on wall angles and overhangs

• Brutally hard stages where one bad jump means a long fall

• Rotating platforms, spikes, and narrow passages

• Per-area fastest-time leaderboards: the LEGENDS

• Mouse-driven, portrait-view climbing built for PC
description_short: A brutally hard 2D climbing action game where your cat jumps exactly where you click. Rely on tiny footholds and overcome the long falls your mistakes bring. Reach the top and carve your name into the LEGENDS.
